Nora Studio
Home AI Dashboard AI Studio Health
Operational Workspace

Design Nora’s AI behavior, memory, and hosted-bot workflows from one place.

This workspace gives you live controls for persona tuning, current-memory visibility, bot profile management, and automation templates. It is built to make Nora feel faster, more personalized, and honest about what it is doing.

– Guilds currently connected to Nora.
– Memory and process uptime summary.
– AI requests used this billing cycle.
– Estimated tokens consumed by your AI usage.
Live Operating Notes

Bot Status

Loading system health…

Current Persona

Loading your AI profile…

Current Workspace Route

Use this workspace to keep Nora aligned with your community, your style, and your hosted-bot plans.

AI Persona & Response Tuning

Shape what Nora says, how much context it uses, and when it reaches out to live web data. These settings are stored in your account preferences and available for future expansion.

Use live web context

Allow Nora to pull live search context when the prompt asks for current information.

Auto-summarize long history

Compress old messages into a shorter recap before the AI response is generated.

Show explanation note on fallback

Let users know when Nora is running on a fallback engine or local path.

Your prompt preview will appear here once the settings are loaded.
No prompt preview generated yet.

Memory Lab

Inspect the context Nora can actually use from the selected channel and use that information to spot drift, missing data, or stale context.

No channel context has been fetched yet.

Automation Templates

Draft custom workflow scenarios for your hosted bots and your community. These are stored locally, so you can iterate without needing to touch live commands.

Hosted Bot Builder

Create or update hosted bot profiles from the dashboard, then bind reusable custom commands directly to the bot’s command set.

Custom Command Composer

Define command metadata and response payloads for a selected bot. The response can be plain text, structured embed JSON, or an action blueprint.

Select a bot to build a command preview.

Community Transparency

Understand what Nora is doing right now and what the workspace is using to build context and automate responses.

Fetching live system snapshot…
Why this matters: Nora can be more helpful when you can see the current memory window, the active workflow settings, and the hosted-bot setup. This transparency layer is designed to make the system feel safe, honest, and expandable.
